picks.quote: Patty Pimlet... I didn't think he was going to pull that off... But I've seen now on two to three separate occasions... this guy is a finisher in jiu-jitsu... Good job, Patty, awesome.
Mario Bautista, I did pick him to win and that was a tough one... tip my hat to Bautista, beating Sanhagen is very hard. Got the job done.
Bobby King Green, my guy, against Terrence McKenna... That's experience. That's our guy Bobby Green.
Robert Whitaker made his light heavyweight debut and won by TKO... That's how hard Robert Whitaker is hitting.
Adrien Giannis and Cody Garbrandt, that fight... Yanz is able to catch him... And that was the second one of those punches that he caught him with. The second one did the job.
Stefson... he just looked like if you press fast forward on him... Stefson is the shit and I can't wait to watch him.
